name: nexus-monorepo
description: Nexus open-source monorepo - CLI, daemon, and wire contracts
author: 42ch

scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter nexus-codegen run build && pnpm --filter nexus-codegen run codegen && pnpm --filter @42ch/nexus-contracts run build
scripts.codegen:watch: pnpm --filter nexus-codegen run build && pnpm --filter nexus-codegen run dev
